title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Everything you need to know about ordering from Yellow Leaf Cafe

items.question: How do I place an order?
items.answer:
1. Browse our premium selection and add items to your cart
2. Check out and complete payment
3. You'll receive order confirmation via WhatsApp
4. Expect delivery within 1-3 business days in Pattaya, 3-5 days elsewhere in Thailand

items.question: What is the minimum order?
items.answer: The minimum order amount is ฿3,000. Free delivery is available on all orders over ฿5,000.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept bank transfer, PromptPay, credit cards, and cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, USDT). Payment details are provided at checkout.

items.question: How is my order delivered?
items.answer: Orders are packaged discreetly and shipped via express courier. Pattaya local orders may qualify for same-day delivery. All orders come with tracking.

items.question: Do you deliver outside Pattaya?
items.answer: Yes! We deliver across all of Thailand. Pattaya and Chon Buri orders arrive in 1-2 days. Bangkok in 1-3 days. Other provinces in 3-5 business days.

items.question: Are your products lab-tested?
items.answer: Yes, all our cannabis products are lab-tested for potency, purity, and safety. We source only from licensed Thai growers.

items.question: Do you offer free gifts?
items.answer: Free gifts are available for orders over ฿5,000. Gift options must be selected at checkout.

items.question: Can I contact customer support?
items.answer: Yes! Reach us via WhatsApp, email at support@yellowleaf.club, or visit us at our shop in Pattaya City.

items.question: Do you have a physical store?
items.answer: Yes! Visit us at 361/4-5, Bang Lamung, Pattaya City, Chon Buri 20150, Thailand. Open daily.

items.question: How does the loyalty program work?
items.answer: Earn 1 point for every ฿35 spent. Redeem 20 points for ฿35 off your next order. Sign up and get 500 bonus points!
